|locations=*[[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]<ref name="Sector">Page 67 of ''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]'' establishes that Nebula Consumables operates within the same [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in which [[Gelgelar/Legends|Gelgelar]] is located. The [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] establishes that Gelgelar is located in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]], meaning that Nebula Consumables also operates within the Elrood sector.</ref>

{{Quote|I absolutely must insist on greater Imperial Fleet presence in the Noonian system. An alarming number of pirates has recently been plaguing merchant vessels, particularly those hauling cargoes for Nebula Consumables.|[[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Trophan Thanis]] in a communique to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Gergris]]|<ref name="RP" />}}
'''Nebula Consumables''' was a food producer and supplier headquartered on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tyed Kant]].<ref name="RP" /> They were the largest food producer on Tyed Kant. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] the company sold most of its product to planetary governments and to the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]].<ref name="MC" /> Nebula Consumables provided food for the ''[[Queen of Empire]]'',<ref name="HT">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''</ref> and it was a rival corporation of [[Salliche Agricultural Corporation]].<ref name="JE">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''</ref>
